name: Lalune Limousine
recent_news: No M&A or operational news found; appears to be a very small SFO-area limo/town-car operator (PO Box 283016 is an SFO airport mailing address used by TCP charter-party carriers). No evidence of any school-bus, SPED, or student transport contracts.

fit_notes: Not a fit. Majestic Limo SF is a chauffeured-sedan/limo operator that does private family-style child rides on request; it is not a school-bus contractor with a fleet, route operations, or district relationships. Should be filtered out of the Summit tuck-in universe.

name: Medxpress
recent_news: Medxpress LLC operates as a non-emergency medical transport (NEMT) van provider at 1642 N Texas St #D, Fairfield, CA. No school-district business, no school-bus fleet, and no M&A news identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Medxpress is a Medicaid/NEMT van operator, not a student-transportation or special-needs school-route contractor. Different regulatory regime (DHCS/Medi-Cal) and customer base (healthcare payors, not districts). Should be filtered out of the Summit tuck-in universe.
